checkpoint_context: Final full-positive hybrid PU-XMSAT checkpoint perturbation sensitivity. This remains local model sensitivity, not causal or external validation.
source_claim_boundary: Perturbation score drops are local sensitivity signals, not causal effects.
claim_boundary: 本报告只解释当前已量化案例中的局部扰动敏感性；不是因果效应、不是 SHAP 值、不是外部临床验证。
